attributes.action: Do not join a war with Iran without complete and open public consultation & vote
attributes.additional_details: We do not want to get drawn into another Iraq or Afghanistan.  We do not want to sleepwalk into another disaster, killing countless people, spending vast amounts of money and making the world a less safe place. We ask that this is fully, robustly and completely debated and the public must be fully consulted. We reject the idea of sleepwalking into another directionless and ill-advised war without full consultation.
attributes.background: Lets not allow ourselves as the United Kingdom to get drawn into an endless war with Iran without robust, open and complete debate and argument, upto and potentially including a public vote.

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action. We're not sure exactly what you'd like the Government or Parliament to do.

You could start a new petition explaining clearly what you would like the Government or Parliament to do. Or you may wish to sign the following petitions:

"Hold an immediate parliamentary vote on US use of UK bases"
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/762994

"Withdraw involvement in war on Iran and seek diplomatic resolution"
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761718
